expectations.text: Creates or plans a new parent tracker issue because the source was not a GitHub issue.
expectations.evidence: No queue-guide issue is needed in this draft because the source was raw PRD text, so the parent tracker body carries the queue guidance.  Notes: - Dry run only; commands and issue bodies are dr

uncertainties:
Assumptions:
- The prompt's raw feature description is sufficient to draft issues without a clarification loop.
- No existing GitHub parent issue or repository-specific architecture context was provided, so a new parent tracker was drafted and likely files/test commands were left as placeholders.
- All slices were marked AFK because the source text did not explicitly require a human product, design, security, or compliance decision before implementation.
